info.name: Locker Backend Local
info.description: Updated collection matching the current backend. Includes auth, filtered list GETs, operation SSE, RDS audit/security reads, bookings, payments, device commands, and admin/operator locker routes.

request.description: Reads SECURITY_ALERT structured logs from CloudWatch Logs Insights. Alerts are not stored in RDS.
Operator-accessible endpoint that reads SECURITY_ALERT structured logs from CloudWatch Logs Insights. Alerts are not stored in RDS.

exec: if (value === undefined || value === null || value === '') return;

return value && typeof value === 'object' ? value : undefined;
